description: Unified ChatGPT send. If chat_id is provided, continues that thread; otherwise starts a fresh chat. Supports 0..N file attachments, model + thinking-effort selection, and a single tool toggle (web search, deep research, image gen, canvas, agent). Replaces the legacy new_chat_send / new_chat_send_attachment / continue_chat / send_current_composer family.

examples.command: rzn-browser run chatgpt send --param message_text="Summarize the last three commits."
examples.description: Start a fresh chat with no attachments on GPT-5.6 Sol / Pro.

examples.command: rzn-browser run chatgpt send --param chat_id="01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef" --param message_text="Add unit tests."
rzn-browser run chatgpt send --param message_text="Compare these specs." --param attachment_file_paths='["/abs/spec_a.pdf","/abs/spec_b.pdf"]' --param tool="search"
examples.description: Fresh chat with two attachments and web search enabled.

examples.command: rzn-browser run chatgpt send --param chat_id="01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef" --param message_text="Investigate further." --param tool="deep_research"
examples.description: Continue with deep research on a thread.

notes: Single canonical send workflow: continues a thread when chat_id is provided, starts a fresh chat when omitted. Supports 0..N attachments, model + thinking-effort selection, and a tool toggle.

Model and intelligence commits use CDP Input.dispatchMouseEvent via click_element use_cdp:true. The workflow selects GPT-5.6 Sol in the model submenu, selects Pro in the Intelligence menu, reopens both menus to verify them, and hard-fails on every mismatch.

The model submenu trigger is matched structurally (the sole role=menuitem[aria-haspopup=menu] in the picker), NOT by its label text. ChatGPT renders that trigger's label as the currently-selected model (e.g. 'GPT-5.5'), so label-matching only worked when the account was already on Sol. Structural matching makes selection reliable no matter which model the account was previously left on.

Setting tool=image_gen triggers the inline image-generation toggle on the regular conversation surface; pair with chatgpt_images_download (passing the returned chat_id) when you want the generated images saved locally.
Multi-file upload uses ChatGPT's existing #upload-files input directly (no need to click the +/photos menu first) and works because that input has multiple=true.
If a tool is missing from the top-level + menu, the workflow auto-expands the More submenu before failing.

parameters.attachment_file_paths: Zero or more absolute file paths to upload. Pass as a JSON array, a comma-separated string, or omit for no attachments.
parameters.chat_id: If present, continues this existing thread. If absent or empty, starts a fresh chat.
parameters.model_effort: Intelligence tier. Must be Pro when provided; defaults to Pro.
parameters.model_slug: Model label. Must be GPT-5.6 Sol when provided; defaults to GPT-5.6 Sol.
parameters.tool: Single tool toggle to enable before sending. Defaults to none.
parameters.model_version: Model version guard. Must be 5.6 when provided; defaults to 5.6.
parameters.require_exact_model: Exact-selection guard. Must be true when provided; defaults to true.

help.summary: One workflow that sends a message to ChatGPT. New thread when chat_id is empty, continue thread when chat_id is set. Optional attachments (0..N), optional model/effort, optional tool toggle.

name: ChatGPT: Send

attachment_file_paths.description: Zero or more absolute file paths to upload. Pass as a JSON array, a comma-separated string, or omit for no attachments.

chat_id.description: If present, continues this existing thread. If absent or empty, starts a fresh chat.

model_effort.description: Intelligence tier. Only Pro is supported. Defaults to Pro and hard-fails if selection cannot be verified.

model_slug.description: Model label to select. Only GPT-5.6 Sol is supported. Defaults to GPT-5.6 Sol and matches the visible model-submenu label.

tool.description: Single tool toggle to enable before sending. Defaults to none.

project_id.description: Optional. Start the new chat inside this ChatGPT Project. Accepts a project gizmo id (g-p-...), its short_url (g-p-...-slug), or a full https://chatgpt.com/g/.../project URL. Ignored when chat_id is set (continuing an existing thread already keeps its project).

model_version.description: Model version guard. Only 5.6 is supported; defaults to 5.6.

require_exact_model.description: Must be true when provided. Exact GPT-5.6 Sol / Pro selection is always enforced.

steps.name: Open ChatGPT root in a fresh tab
Allow the SPA shell to settle
Wait for ChatGPT shell (composer or thread article)

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const norm=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const isVisible=(n)=>{if(!n||!(n instanceof Element))return false;const s=getComputedStyle(n);if(s.visibility==='hidden'||s.display==='none')return false;const r=n.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const labelOf=(n)=>norm([n.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',n.getAttribute('title')||'',n.getAttribute('data-testid')||'',n.textContent||''].join(' '));const realClick=(n)=>{n.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});['pointerdown','mousedown','pointerup','mouseup','click'].forEach(evt=>n.dispatchEvent(new (evt.startsWith('pointer')?PointerEvent:MouseEvent)(evt,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,button:0})));};const chatId=cleanArg(arg0);if(chatId){const target='/c/'+chatId;if(!location.pathname.startsWith(target)){location.assign('https://chatgpt.com'+target);return{triggered:'navigate_to_chat',target};}return{triggered:'already_on_chat'};}const projectId=cleanArg(arg1);if(projectId){let purl;if(/^https?:/i.test(projectId))purl=projectId;else if(projectId.indexOf('/g/')>=0)purl='https://chatgpt.com'+(projectId.charAt(0)==='/'?projectId:'/'+projectId);else purl='https://chatgpt.com/g/'+projectId+'/project';const idm=projectId.match(/g-p-[a-z0-9]+/i);const onProj=idm?location.pathname.indexOf(idm[0])>=0:false;if(!onProj){location.assign(purl);return{triggered:'navigate_to_project',target:purl};}return{triggered:'already_on_project',target:purl};}const tempActive=new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('temporary-chat')==='true';let toggledTemp=false;if(tempActive){const tempBtn=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role=button]')).filter(isVisible).find(b=>/temporary chat/i.test(labelOf(b)));if(tempBtn){realClick(tempBtn);toggledTemp=true;}}const onChatRoute=/^\/c\//.test(location.pathname);if(onChatRoute){const newChatLink=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("a[data-testid='create-new-chat-button'], a[href='/'], a[href^='/?model=']")).filter(isVisible)[0]||Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role=button]')).filter(isVisible).find(b=>/^new chat\b|new conversation|start new chat/i.test(labelOf(b)));if(newChatLink){realClick(newChatLink);return{triggered:'clicked_new_chat',toggledTemp};}}return{triggered:onChatRoute?'no_new_chat_btn':'already_fresh',toggledTemp};

steps.name: Routing: continue /c/{chat_id}, else open Project when project_id set, else ensure fresh chat
Wait for the routed page to settle (navigation may have changed URL)
Wait for composer on the landed page

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\xa0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const isVisible=(n)=>{if(!n||!(n instanceof Element))return false;const s=getComputedStyle(n);if(s.visibility==='hidden'||s.display==='none')return false;const r=n.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const realClick=(n)=>{if(!n)return;n.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});['pointerover','pointerenter','pointermove','pointerdown','mousedown','pointerup','mouseup','click'].forEach(e=>{const Ev=e.startsWith('pointer')?PointerEvent:MouseEvent;n.dispatchEvent(new Ev(e,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,button:0,pointerType:'mouse',isPrimary:true,clientX:200,clientY:200}));});};const closeMenus=async()=>{for(let i=0;i<4;i++){if(!document.querySelector('[role=menu][data-state=open]'))return;document.body.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Escape',keyCode:27,bubbles:true}));await sleep(150);}};const findPill=()=>{for(const sel of ['button.__composer-pill[aria-haspopup=menu]','button[data-testid="model-switcher-dropdown-button"]']){const n=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(sel)).find(isVisible);if(n)return n;}return null;};const head=(n)=>norm(n?.textContent||'').split('\n')[0].trim();const REQUIRED_MODEL='GPT-5.6 Sol';const REQUIRED_VERSION='5.6';const REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE='Pro';const rawModel=cleanArg(arg0)||REQUIRED_MODEL;const rawEffort=cleanArg(arg1)||REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE;const rawVersion=cleanArg(arg2)||REQUIRED_VERSION;const requireExact=(cleanArg(arg3)||'true').toLowerCase()==='true';if(norm(rawModel).toLowerCase()!==REQUIRED_MODEL.toLowerCase()||norm(rawVersion)!==REQUIRED_VERSION||norm(rawEffort).toLowerCase()!==REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE.toLowerCase()||!requireExact)throw new Error('unsupported_model_lane: only GPT-5.6 Sol / 5.6 / Pro with require_exact_model=true is allowed');window.__rzn_chatgpt_picker={desiredModel:REQUIRED_MODEL,desiredVersion:REQUIRED_VERSION,desiredEffort:REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE,desiredLabel:REQUIRED_MODEL,requireExact:true};await closeMenus();const pill=findPill();if(!pill)throw new Error('model_picker_not_found');realClick(pill);let trigger=null;let deadline=Date.now()+4000;while(Date.now()<deadline){const triggers=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role=menu] [role=menuitem][aria-haspopup=menu]')).filter(isVisible);trigger=triggers.find(n=>/gpt-|(^|\s)o\d|sol/i.test(head(n)))||triggers[0];if(trigger)break;await sleep(120);}if(!trigger){await closeMenus();throw new Error('model_submenu_trigger_not_found');}const triggerLabel=head(trigger);realClick(trigger);let target=null;deadline=Date.now()+4000;while(Date.now()<deadline){const radios=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role=menuitemradio]')).filter(isVisible);target=radios.find(n=>head(n).toLowerCase()===REQUIRED_MODEL.toLowerCase());if(target)break;await sleep(120);}if(!target){await closeMenus();throw new Error('model_not_found_in_submenu: wanted '+REQUIRED_MODEL+', current_trigger='+triggerLabel);}target.id='rzn-target-model';return{ok:true,desiredModel:REQUIRED_MODEL,desiredVersion:REQUIRED_VERSION,desiredEffort:REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE,trigger_label:triggerLabel,already_checked:target.getAttribute('aria-checked')==='true',target_text:head(target)};

steps.name: Open the model submenu and stamp GPT-5.6 Sol with id=rzn-target-model
Trusted CDP click on the stamped model radio (ChatGPT silently drops synthetic events here)
Let the GPT-5.6 Sol model commit settle

inputs.script: const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\xa0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const isVisible=(n)=>{if(!n||!(n instanceof Element))return false;const s=getComputedStyle(n);if(s.visibility==='hidden'||s.display==='none')return false;const r=n.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const realClick=(n)=>{if(!n)return;n.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});['pointerover','pointerenter','pointermove','pointerdown','mousedown','pointerup','mouseup','click'].forEach(e=>{const Ev=e.startsWith('pointer')?PointerEvent:MouseEvent;n.dispatchEvent(new Ev(e,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,button:0,pointerType:'mouse',isPrimary:true,clientX:200,clientY:200}));});};const closeMenus=async()=>{for(let i=0;i<4;i++){if(!document.querySelector('[role=menu][data-state=open]'))return;document.body.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Escape',keyCode:27,bubbles:true}));await sleep(150);}};const findPill=()=>{for(const sel of ['button.__composer-pill[aria-haspopup=menu]','button[data-testid="model-switcher-dropdown-button"]']){const n=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(sel)).find(isVisible);if(n)return n;}return null;};const head=(n)=>norm(n?.textContent||'').split('\n')[0].trim();const REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE='Pro';const ctx=window.__rzn_chatgpt_picker||{};if(ctx.desiredModel!=='GPT-5.6 Sol'||ctx.desiredVersion!=='5.6'||ctx.desiredEffort!==REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE||ctx.requireExact!==true)throw new Error('missing_exact_model_context');await closeMenus();const pill=findPill();if(!pill)throw new Error('model_picker_not_found_for_intelligence');realClick(pill);let target=null;const deadline=Date.now()+4000;while(Date.now()<deadline){const radios=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role=menuitemradio]')).filter(isVisible);target=radios.find(n=>head(n).toLowerCase()===REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE.toLowerCase());if(target)break;await sleep(120);}if(!target){await closeMenus();throw new Error('intelligence_not_found: wanted '+REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE);}target.id='rzn-target-effort';return{ok:true,desiredIntelligence:REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE,current:target.getAttribute('aria-checked')==='true'?head(target):null,target_text:head(target)};

steps.name: Open Intelligence and stamp Pro with id=rzn-target-effort
Trusted CDP click on the stamped Pro intelligence radio
Let Pro intelligence commit settle before exact verification

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\xa0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const isVisible=(n)=>{if(!n||!(n instanceof Element))return false;const s=getComputedStyle(n);if(s.visibility==='hidden'||s.display==='none')return false;const r=n.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const realClick=(n)=>{if(!n)return;n.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});['pointerover','pointerenter','pointermove','pointerdown','mousedown','pointerup','mouseup','click'].forEach(e=>{const Ev=e.startsWith('pointer')?PointerEvent:MouseEvent;n.dispatchEvent(new Ev(e,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,button:0,pointerType:'mouse',isPrimary:true,clientX:200,clientY:200}));});};const closeMenus=async()=>{for(let i=0;i<4;i++){if(!document.querySelector('[role=menu][data-state=open]'))return;document.body.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Escape',keyCode:27,bubbles:true}));await sleep(150);}};const findPill=()=>{for(const sel of ['button.__composer-pill[aria-haspopup=menu]','button[data-testid="model-switcher-dropdown-button"]']){const n=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(sel)).find(isVisible);if(n)return n;}return null;};const head=(n)=>norm(n?.textContent||'').split('\n')[0].trim();const ctx=window.__rzn_chatgpt_picker||{};const REQUIRED_MODEL='GPT-5.6 Sol';const REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE='Pro';const tool=cleanArg(arg0).toLowerCase();if(ctx.desiredModel!==REQUIRED_MODEL||ctx.desiredVersion!=='5.6'||ctx.desiredEffort!==REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE||ctx.requireExact!==true)throw new Error('missing_exact_model_context');await closeMenus();const pill=findPill();if(!pill)throw new Error('model_picker_not_found_during_verify');realClick(pill);let radios=[];let deadline=Date.now()+4000;while(Date.now()<deadline){radios=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role=menuitemradio]')).filter(isVisible);if(radios.length)break;await sleep(120);}const intelligence=radios.find(n=>n.getAttribute('aria-checked')==='true'&&head(n).toLowerCase()===REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE.toLowerCase());const triggers=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role=menu] [role=menuitem][aria-haspopup=menu]')).filter(isVisible);const modelTrigger=triggers.find(n=>/gpt-|(^|\s)o\d|sol/i.test(head(n)))||triggers[0];if(!intelligence||!modelTrigger){const got=radios.find(n=>n.getAttribute('aria-checked')==='true');await closeMenus();throw new Error('model_selection_verify_failed: wanted '+REQUIRED_MODEL+' / '+REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE+'; got model='+(modelTrigger?head(modelTrigger):'?')+', intelligence='+(got?head(got):'?'));}realClick(modelTrigger);let modelChecked=null;deadline=Date.now()+4000;while(Date.now()<deadline){const visible=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role=menuitemradio]')).filter(isVisible);modelChecked=visible.find(n=>n.getAttribute('aria-checked')==='true'&&head(n).toLowerCase()===REQUIRED_MODEL.toLowerCase());if(modelChecked)break;await sleep(120);}await closeMenus();if(!modelChecked)throw new Error('model_selection_verify_failed: '+REQUIRED_MODEL+' is not checked in the model submenu');const modelSelection={applied:true,model_selected:REQUIRED_MODEL,version_selected:'5.6',effort_selected:REQUIRED_INTELLIGENCE,note:'exact model and intelligence verified'};const TOOL_LABELS={search:'Web search',web_search:'Web search',deep_research:'Deep research',image_gen:'Create image',create_image:'Create image',canvas:'Canvas',agent:'Agent mode',agent_mode:'Agent mode'};const selectTool=async()=>{if(!tool||tool==='none')return{selected:null};const wanted=TOOL_LABELS[tool];if(!wanted)return{selected:null,note:'unknown_tool',input:tool};const plus=document.querySelector('#composer-plus-btn');if(!plus)return{selected:null,note:'no_plus_btn'};realClick(plus);await sleep(600);const findRadio=()=>Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role=menuitemradio]')).filter(isVisible).find(el=>norm(el.textContent).toLowerCase()===wanted.toLowerCase());let target=findRadio();if(!target){const moreItem=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role=menuitem]')).filter(isVisible).find(el=>/^\s*more\b/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(moreItem){realClick(moreItem);await sleep(500);target=findRadio();}}if(!target){await closeMenus();return{selected:null,note:'tool_not_in_menu',wanted};}realClick(target);await sleep(500);return{selected:wanted};};const stampFileInput=()=>{const input=document.querySelector('#upload-files');if(input){input.id='rzn-chatgpt-upload-input';input.setAttribute('data-rzn-upload-prepared','true');return'#rzn-chatgpt-upload-input';}return null;};const toolSel=await selectTool();const uploadSel=stampFileInput();return{url:location.href,title:document.title,model_observed:'GPT-5.6 Sol / Pro',model_selection:modelSelection,tool_selection:toolSel,upload_input_selector:uploadSel,temp_chat_active:new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('temporary-chat')==='true'};

steps.name: Verify GPT-5.6 Sol / Pro, run tool selection, stamp #upload-files
Upload 0..N attachments via the prepared #upload-files input (no-op when empty)
Let attachment chips render before we look for the send button

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const isVisible=(n)=>{if(!n||!(n instanceof Element))return false;const s=getComputedStyle(n);if(s.visibility==='hidden'||s.display==='none')return false;const r=n.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const labelOf=(n)=>norm([n.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',n.getAttribute('title')||'',n.getAttribute('data-testid')||'',n.textContent||''].join(' '));const realClick=(n)=>{n.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});['pointerdown','mousedown','pointerup','mouseup','click'].forEach(evt=>n.dispatchEvent(new (evt.startsWith('pointer')?PointerEvent:MouseEvent)(evt,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,button:0})));};const message=cleanArg(arg0);if(!message)throw new Error('message_text is required');const findComposer=()=>{const el=document.querySelector('#prompt-textarea');if(el&&isVisible(el))return el;const pm=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div.ProseMirror[contenteditable=true], div[role=textbox][contenteditable=true]')).find(isVisible);if(pm)return pm;return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('textarea')).find(isVisible)||null;};const composer=findComposer();if(!composer)throw new Error('composer not found at submit time, url='+location.href);composer.focus();if(composer instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement||composer instanceof HTMLInputElement){const setter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(Object.getPrototypeOf(composer),'value')?.set;if(setter)setter.call(composer,message);else composer.value=message;composer.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:message}));composer.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}else{composer.textContent=message;composer.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:message}));}await sleep(500);const findSendBtn=()=>{const all=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button[data-testid="send-button"], button[aria-label="Send prompt" i], button[aria-label="Send message" i]')).filter(isVisible);if(all.length)return all[0];const form=composer.closest('form');const scopes=[form,composer.parentElement,document].filter(Boolean);for(const scope of scopes){const candidates=Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll('button, [role=button]')).filter(isVisible).filter(b=>{const lbl=labelOf(b).toLowerCase();return /send prompt|send message|send-button|^send$|submit/i.test(lbl);});if(candidates.length)return candidates[0];}return null;};const isEnabled=(b)=>!(b.matches(':disabled')||b.getAttribute('aria-disabled')==='true');let send=findSendBtn();const sendDeadline=Date.now()+45000;while(Date.now()<sendDeadline){send=findSendBtn();if(send&&isEnabled(send))break;await sleep(400);}if(!send)throw new Error('send button not found within deadline, composer_text='+(composer.textContent||'').slice(0,40)+', url='+location.href);if(!isEnabled(send))throw new Error('send button never became enabled (uploads still pending?), url='+location.href);realClick(send);return{message_typed:true,send_clicked:true,send_label:labelOf(send)||null,url_after_click:location.href};

steps.name: Type the prompt into the ProseMirror composer and click send
Allow ChatGPT to create the conversation route (new chat) or update existing
Capture the resolved chat_id from the URL

summary: One workflow that sends a message to ChatGPT. New thread when chat_id is empty, continue thread when chat_id is set. Optional attachments (0..N), optional model/effort, optional tool toggle.
